test_cases.prompt: 把内容生产流程做成一张带中文短标签的材质解释图
test_cases.expected_behavior: produce one confirmed process explanation with short labels, arrows and a readable center visual

test_cases.prompt: 把这张周报柱状图美化成材质风，数据和坐标不要改
test_cases.expected_behavior: preserve confirmed chart type, data, axes and units before styling

test_cases.prompt: 给我的效率栏目做 6 个可复用小素材
test_cases.expected_behavior: derive reusable materials from a confirmed explanatory system

test_cases.prompt: 做素材再做封面，但标题没给

test_cases.expected_behavior: offer a fresh system, not copied assets
